title: PV Sindhu Claims Japan Open Title, Ends Losing Streak Against Chen Yufei
indian_angle: This is a major international title win for India's top female shuttler, PV Sindhu, boosting her confidence and ranking.
summary: India's PV Sindhu defeated World No. 4 Chen Yufei in the Japan Open final, securing a significant title and breaking her previous losing streak against the Chinese opponent.

title: BAI Releases Eligibility Criteria for World Junior Championships 2026
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has issued guidelines for selecting Indian players for the upcoming World Junior Championships.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has published the eligibility requirements for Indian players aspiring to participate in the BWF World Junior Championships 2026, to be held in Cairo.

title: Bhubaneswar U-19 Tournament Becomes World Junior Championships Selection Event
indian_angle: This announcement impacts Indian junior players aiming for the World Championships by clarifying the key selection event.
summary: Following the postponement of the Haryana U-19 Ranking Tournament, the Bhubaneswar U-19 event has been designated as the official selection tournament for the BWF World Junior Championships 2026.

title: Attracting Gen Z and Alpha Crucial for Delhi World Championships 2026
indian_angle: This article discusses the strategic importance of engaging younger Indian audiences for the success of the upcoming BWF World Championships in Delhi.
summary: An analysis highlights the necessity of attracting Gen Z and Gen Alpha viewers to ensure a vibrant future for badminton fandom, particularly for the 2026 BWF World Championships hosted in Delhi.

title: 3x15 Scoring System to Debut in Indian Domestic Junior Tournaments
indian_angle: This new scoring format will significantly impact young Indian badminton players in national and ranking tournaments.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has announced the implementation of a 3x15 scoring system for U-13, U-15, and U-17 domestic ranking tournaments and national championships, set to debut in Ernakulam.
